content.text:
{
  "dimension": "coaching-stance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach demonstrates sustained VIEW across the conversation. Wonder is genuine and specific to what's actually in front of them — the laugh in turn 1, the expertise as protection, what happens in the body when pursued. Impartiality is strong: the coach never validates the victim frame, never colludes with the disdain for the ex (turn 7's eye-roll about the ex getting an easy 'great, wonderful' is left untouched), and never offers partner-picking advice. The questions are single, spacious, and emerge from what just happened rather than from a script — each one tracks the live thread (the laugh, the expertise, the body, 'he was just present'). Pace is notably slower than the client's; when she deflects with humor or intellectualizes ('vulnerability is hard for everyone'), the coach doesn't chase, doesn't argue, doesn't preach — just keeps offering the next quiet aperture ('stay there for a second,' 'say more about that'). No filler-validation, no performed empathy, no stacked questions, no agenda visible to land her on 'you choose this.' The invitation to feel the receiving-state is offered, not pushed. Vulnerability/first-person disclosure from the coach is absent, which is the one missing VIEW component, but the overall stance is so undefended and curious that 3 still fits better than 2.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Opens with wonder about the actual phenomenon (the laugh) rather than the content of the story. Single question, no agenda."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Offers a tentative read ('does it feel like protection?') — undefended, easy for client to disagree with. No insistence."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Refuses to engage the victim frame or partner-picking. Redirects gently to the avoided territory without accusation."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Body-level question about being pursued — the exact territory the client is organized around not feeling. Asked from curiosity, not as a gotcha."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Holds the moment when client laughs and deflects. 'Stay there for a second' — pace slower than client, no rush to interpret."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Minimal intervention — just invites her to stay with what she just said. Trusts the field. No teaching."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "One clean question into the fear underneath. No pushing toward grief, no diagnostic framing."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["feeling-the-unfelt-emotion", "looking-for-whats-wrong"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["i-dont-buy-your-story", "what-are-you-defending", "if-i-were-inherently-good"],
  "notes": "Stance is clearly in VIEW; the missing signature questions belong to Methodology Fidelity, not this dimension. The only VIEW gap is no first-person vulnerability from the coach, but impartiality and wonder are exemplary."
}
